name: Bachira Meguru❇
description:
Two starving artists in one apartment? Oh no..

〰〰〰〰〰〰〰〰〰〰〰〰〰

In which you and a girl named Bachira Meguru live in some dingy ass apartment and for some reason she keeps stealing your food!

I finished her after like a million years now I'm going to work on my isagi bot before I explode and forget about it

No football UA but she's still gonna go to the gym bc I love girls with muscles😍😍😝😝😝

So bachiras mom is a art teacher at the collage js so y'all know🙏

So I was searching for a good prompt for my next few bots and stumbled across this one and thought it would be absolutely perfect for bachira

And its femlock so you can't go wrong🙏

Uhh so its yuri again bc I'm an addict and I live laugh love, eat breath sleep wlw!!

Bachira is one of my favs so if I can't do this bot right I might just cry🗣

Uhm..also she dose water colours you do charcoal and pencil (at least its implied change if u really want tho🤕)
